content.summary: Kenton Varda (@KentonVarda) Dynamic Workers are now in Open Beta, all paid Workers users have access. Secure sandboxes that start ~100x faster than a container and use 1/10 the memory, so you can start one up on-demand to handle one AI chat message and then throw it away. Agents should interact with the world by writing code, not tool calls. This makes that possible at "consumer scale", where millions of end users each have their own agent writing code. blog.cloudflare.com/dynamic-… — https://nitter.net/KentonVarda/status/2036430052238254301#m

Secure sandboxes that start ~100x faster than a container and use 1/10 the memory, so you can start one up on-demand to handle one AI chat message and then throw it away. Agents should interact with the world by writing code, not tool calls.
